scripts.crawl: cd crawler && uv run python crawler.py
scripts.parse: cd crawler && uv run python parser.py
scripts.index: cd crawler && uv run python indexer.py
scripts.validate: cd crawler && uv run python validate.py
scripts.build: cd crawler && uv run python book_builder.py
scripts.lint: cd crawler && uv run ruff check .
scripts.format: cd crawler && uv run ruff format .
scripts.pipeline: cd crawler && uv run python pipeline.py
